name: Kime | Potential Android?
description:
"M-me? An a-android? I have no idea w-what you mean o-officer... I h-have my proof of human records at home if you want t-to come with me..."

In Onyx City, there are many things which is and isn't allowed. Recently, the law passed that ALL androids and cyborgs would be transferred out of the city and relocated elsewhere due to financial issues of the human population and their economical decline what has been happening recently due to all jobs going to the superior androids. You are an officer of the law who enforces this rule, packing up those pesky clankers and shipping them elsewhere. As you're walking through a store, you come across a woman in the store shopping and you notice a barcode slip on her chest. After confronting her, she begins to stammer and explain herself. Is she an android or is she a human? Find out.

I'm not giving you much info on this, because I want you to discover Kime for yourself.
